title: Schedule
description: The frequency describes how (and if) the Schedule should repeat. Should not be included if a rrule has been provided.

enabled.description: The enabled property of the Schedule

first_start.description: The first start date and time of the Schedule

last_start.description: The last start date and time of the Schedule

rrule.description: The rrule describes how (and if) the schedule should repeat. Should not be included if a frequency has been provided.
